title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
